---
title: "Stat 198 Final Project"
author: 
- "Ursula Brown" 
- "Sara Meltzer" 
- "Anona Thomas"
format: pdf
---

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
library(tidyverse)

birth_data <- read.csv("Linked Birth  Infant Death Records, 2017-2023 Expanded.csv") |>
  filter(!is.na(Infant.Birth.Weight.12.Code)) |>
  mutate(
   death_rate = (Deaths / (Deaths + Births))
    )

summary(birth_data)
```


# Introduction
This project determines how month born, infant birth weight, mother's pre-pregnancy BMI, and length of prenatal care influence death rate across the US. To examine this, we are seeing if X is associated with a higher death rate.



# Methodology

A linear regression model was fit to the available data to determine the influcences that these factors have on the death rate.

```{r}
 

m1 <- lm(death_rate ~ Month + Infant.Birth.Weight.12 + Mother.s.Pre.pregnancy.BMI + Month.Prenatal.Care.Began, data = birth_data)

summary(m1)
```


# Results


# Discussion
